response.original_title: 肉体訪問販売 ノルマの代償
response.overview: With their gentle smiles, skillful conversation, and the allure and provocation of their voluptuous bodies, these door-to-door sexy saleswomen sell dubious products. What are the secret techniques of these sales ladies that can win over any customer? These women, competing to achieve the highest sales figures and setting traps for their customers, are themselves trapped! What fate awaits the top-selling saleswoman who is raped, imprisoned and tortured by a psychopath…?
response.title: 肉体訪問販売 ノルマの代償
